items.title: The Chicks Are Ready to Make Tour Plans, With ‘Taking the Long Way’ 20th Anniversary Theater Outing Set for Fall

items.summary: ZAGREBAČKA Arena ove će jeseni dva dana zaredom biti u znaku Seke Aleksić.

items.summary: Sony Music and Julie Swidler, the company’s longtime executive VP of business affairs and general counsel, have announced her “long-planned” departure at the end of June.
